+[  Input Stage  ]--+
|                   |
|    +--------+     |
|    |  Read  |     |
|    +----+---+     |
|         |         |
|         v         |
|    +---------+    |
|    |  Parse  |    |
|    +----+----+    |
|         |         |
|         |         |
|         |         |
+---------|---------+
          |
          |
         -+
+[  Transform Stage  ]---+
|        |               |
|        v               |
| +------------+         |
| |  Validate  |         |
+[  Output Stage  ]--+   |
|        |           |   |
|        v           |   |
|  +----------++     |   |
|  |  Format  ||     |   |
|  +-----+----++     |   |
|        |           |   |
|        v           |   |
|   +---------+      |   |
|   |  Write  |      |   |
|   +---------+      |   |
|                    |   |
|                    |   |
+--------------------+   |
|                        |
+------------------------+
